problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to types, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
